Stormfire.d: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Enemies Shocked by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from Ignite as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage.

Streamlined Rounds.d: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Attack speed and bolt capacity, but deal less damage and have longer reload time.

Strong Hearted.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

Stun I.d: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

Stun II.d: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

Stun III.d: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.

Styrn's Ferocity.d: Supports Shield Skills that Hit enemies, causing those Hits to Crush their targets, additionally causing any Physical Damage Hits against those targets while Crushed to Break their Armour.

Styrn's Mountain.d: Supports Skills that Raise your Shield causing your other melee skills to deal more damage if you block.

Summon Infernal Hound.d: Activate to summon a Reviving Infernal Hound which Ignites enemies near it.

Summon Spectre.d: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a Reviving Minion.

Sunder.d: Slam the ground, creating a roiling fissure that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies. Hitting an enemy with Fully Broken Armour applies Sundered Armour, making it take additional increased Physical damage.

Supercharged Slam.d: Channel to charge up a heavy swing, drawing earth from the ground to enlarge your mace. Release to Slam the ground, dealing damage in an area around the impact, followed by Aftershocks dealing damage in a larger area. This Skill has its own Attack time, which is not affected by your weapon's attack speed and cannot be modified.

Supercritical.d: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage with Critical Hits but have less Critical Hit chance.

Supporting Fire.d: Recruit artillery Minions that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your Command, then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.

Swift Affliction I.d: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.

Swift Affliction II.d: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.

Swift Affliction III.d: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing effects with a duration of one second or less to deal more non-Ailment damage over time.

Syzygy.d: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Hits from Supported Skills are considered Crushing Blows against Enemies which are both Ignited and Fully Armour Broken. Hits with Supported Skills that Heavily Stun Ignited and Fully Armour Broken Enemies will Intimidate them.

Tacati's Ire.d: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.

Tame Beast.d: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a Rare Beast for a duration, Hindering them. If you defeat the Beast while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the Beast as a Reviving Companion.

Tamed Companion.d: Summon a Reviving Beast Companion to aid you in combat.

Tangmazu's Thurible.d: Supports Skills which summon Companions causing them to be Gigantic and gain Evasion and Deflection based on your own.

Tasalio's Rhythm.d: Supports Skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Tasalio's Rhythm. Tasalio's Rhythm causes Supported Skills to deal more damage and have shorter Perfect Timing windows for each stack. Failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.

Tawhoa's Tending.d: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.

Tear.d: Supports Melee Attacks you use or Trigger yourself. On-Kill effects caused by Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies have a chance to occur twice.

Tecrod's Revenge.d: Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.

Tectonic Slams.d: Supports Slams you use yourself, causing them to create simultaneous Aftershocks behind the Slam, but lowering Aftershock damage and area of effect with Supported Skills. Cannot Support Skills which create Fissures.

Temper Weapon.d: Channel to temper your main hand Melee Martial Weapon. Each hit of the hammer against the anvil Empowers subsequent Attacks to Combust when Hitting enemies.
Temper Weapon.t: Buff, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Fire, Channelling

Tempest Bell.d: Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to cause the Bell on your staff to grow to massive size as you drop it on the ground. The Bell damages enemies on impact and can be Hit by your skills, creating a damaging shockwave. Elemental Ailments applied to the Bell cause its shockwaves to deal extra damage of the corresponding type, and Hits which would have caused Knockback increase the area of effect of the shockwaves.

Tempest Flurry.d: Perform a series of aggressive Strikes. When used in quick succession, the third use Strikes three times, and the fourth use performs a Final Strike that calls down a powerful Shocking bolt.

Temporal Chains.d: Curse all enemies in an area, Slowing them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.

Temporal Rift.d: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the Spell to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and Energy Shield to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.

The Stars Answer.d: Leash the stars themselves by leveraging your vast magical power, repeatedly Triggering Starfall targeting an enemy in an area around you, or a random location in that area if no enemies can be targeted.
The Stars Answer.t: Buff, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Cold, Duration

Thornskin I.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

Thornskin II.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

Thrashing Vines.d: Spur the growth of huge vines, which emerge randomly within the target area. The vines crash to the ground then retreat, targeting nearby enemies if possible.

Thrill of the Kill II.d: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.

Thrill of the Kill.d: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.

Thundergod's Wrath.d: While active, gains Energy when you Hit enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed Lightning spells on reaching maximum Energy.

Thunderous Leap.d: Leap into the air and plunge your Spear into the ground at the target location, emitting a Lightning-charged shockwave.
Thunderous Leap.t: AoE, Melee, Slam, Lightning, Detonator, Travel

Thunderstorm.d: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain in an area. Enemies in the area are Drenched, causing them to become Shocked or Frozen more easily. Plants in the area become Overgrown.

Time Freeze.d: Release a large wave that stops time for all affected enemies for a duration. Duration is lower the more times the enemy has had time stopped for them.

Time Snap.d: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.

Time of Need.d: While active, periodically invokes divine blessings to heal you and remove Curses and Elemental Ailments from you.

Tireless.d: Supports Warcry Skills. Attacks Empowered by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the Empowerment count of Supported Skills when they are used.

Tornado Shot.d: Fire a skyward shot that whips up a Tornado where it lands, dealing Physical damage over time and Hindering enemies standing in it. Arrows, thrown Spears and Crossbow bolts fired at the Tornado are sucked into it, causing the Tornado to spit out a ring of copied Projectiles. Copied Projectiles cannot be copied again, even by further Tornados.
Tornado Shot.t: AoE, Projectile, Physical, Duration, Repeatable, Wind

Tornado.d: Create a storm that sucks in enemies and deals Physical damage over time. A Tornado that overlaps an Elemental Ground Surface absorbs that surface's Debuff, applying it to enemies inside the Tornado and causing the Tornado to deal extra damage of that element.

Toxic Domain.d: Create an area of Toxic Bloom on the ground around you. While in the Bloom, you have increased Skill costs, Regenerate Life, and your Projectile Attacks attach a Toxic Pustule, which can be Poisoned. Pustules will Detonate after a duration or when enough Poison has been applied, dealing more damage based on the stored Poison damage and applying Poison in an area around it.
Toxic Domain.t: Attack, AoE, Physical, Chaos, Duration, Plant

Toxic Growth.d: Fire a rain of Toxic Pustules into the air. The Pustules deal damage on impact, then Detonate after a delay. They can also be Poisoned, causing them to Detonate faster and more violently.

Trail of Caltrops.d: While active, scatters caltrops in your wake when you dodge.
Trail of Caltrops.t: Buff, Persistent, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Physical, Duration, Hazard

Trickster's Shard.d: Supports non-instant Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells will Trigger Fragment Self, creating a Fractured Mimic which will cast that Spell if you get enough of them.

Trinity.d: Become attuned to all Elements building up Fire, Cold and Lightning Affinity based off the highest Elemental Damage type dealt by your Hits. Your Elemental Damage is enhanced the more Affinity of any type you have.

Triskelion Cascade.d: Tap into the power of the Triskelion Flame to Empower the next Cascadable Spell you cast. The Empowered Spell becomes centred on your location, and Cascades to six areas around you in a Triskelion pattern.

Tul's Avalanche.d: Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them when you Block, The Seals are broken when used, each making the Spell Echo. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

Tul's Stillness.d: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.

Twister.d: Whip up a twister with a flick of your Spear. The twister moves forward erratically, Blinding and repeatedly Hitting enemies within. If a twister touches a Whirlwind from your other skills, it Consumes the Whirlwind to create additional twisters that deal more damage. Passing over Elemental Ground Surfaces or Consuming an elemental Whirlwind will grant twisters extra damage of that element.

Uhtred's Augury.d: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

Uhtred's Constellation.d: Supports non-instant skills which have a cooldown, granting them two additional cooldown uses and more damage per different skill with a cooldown you have used recently.

Uhtred's Exodus.d: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

Uhtred's Omen.d: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

Uhtred's Rite.d: Supports skills with Cooldowns, causing them to grant Overflowing Chalice when used. Supported skills deal more damage during the effect of your Life Flask and have increased Mana Cost Efficiency during the effect of your Mana Flask.

Unbound Avatar.d: Gain Unbound Fury by inflicting Elemental Ailments with Hits on enemies. Once you reach maximum Unbound Fury, consume it to become Unbound for a duration, vastly augmenting your Elemental prowess.

Undermine.d: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills Consume Maim on hit, Breaking a percentage of the Maimed target's Armour in doing so. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Maim.

Unearth.d: Raise spikes of bone from the earth in front of you, damaging enemies. The bones of Corpses and dead Reviving Minions in the area are ripped out and reassembled into short-lived Bone Construct Minions that fight for you. Larger Corpses create more than one Bone Construct.

Unerring Power.d: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. When Supported Attacks are Empowered, they have significantly lowered cost and raised Accuracy.

Unleash.d: Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, Empowering the next Repeatable Spell you cast to Repeat multiple times. Cannot Empower Skills with a Cooldown.

Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

Untouchable.d: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Evasion Rating, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

Upheaval I.d: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create an additional fissure at the cost of damage and speed.

Upheaval II.d: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional fissures at the cost of damage and speed.

Upwelling I.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

Upwelling II.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

Urgent Totems I.d: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

Urgent Totems II.d: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

Urgent Totems III.d: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly. Totems created by Supported Skills have increased Attack and Cast Speed.

Uruk's Smelting.d: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.

Uul-Netol's Embrace.d: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.

Valako's Charge.d: While active, taking Lightning damage builds up charge on you. Reaching full charge expends all charge to Trigger this skill, creating a Chaining lightning bolt that arcs to nearby enemies.

Vanguard I.d: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

Vanguard II.d: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

Varashta's Blessing.d: Supports any Skill that can deal damage, causing it to deal more damage for each different Command Skill you have used in the past few seconds. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

Vaulting Impact.d: Leap forward and Slam the ground, sending out a shockwave. The shockwave applies Broken Stance to Dazed enemies, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.
Vaulting Impact.t: AoE, Melee, Slam, Physical, Duration, Travel, Payoff

Verglas.d: Supports Skills you use yourself which can Hit Enemies. Supported Skills Gain a percentage of their Damage as Cold Damage when you destroy Ice Crystals.

Verisium Manifestations.d: While active, Hitting with an Attack will spend Runic Ward to summon a Verisium Manifestation, a short-lived Temporary Minion that rapidly Attacks nearby enemies, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.

Vilenta's Propulsion.d: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.

Vine Arrow.d: Fire an arrow into the air that lands after a short delay, damaging enemies and causing a plant to spring up at the impact location. The plant sprouts vines that latch onto nearby enemies, Slowing their movement speed and dealing Chaos damage over time. The plant can be Poisoned, causing it to deal more damage.
Vine Arrow.t: AoE, Projectile, Chaos, Duration, Repeatable, Plant

Virtuous Barrier.d: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each Attribute type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are Hit.

Vitality I.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

Vitality II.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

Vivid Stampede.d: Call upon Spirits of the Stag, sending them leaping forward. Each Stag releases a damaging shockwave each time it lands, and any Stags that travel the maximum possible distance also leave behind Shocked Ground.

Void Illusion.d: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will cause damaging explosions. Copies created this way have 1 Life.

Volatile Dead.d: Consume a Corpse to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies and Ignites enemies near it. The core explodes at the end of its duration.

Volatility.d: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills grant Volatility on Critical Hit.

Volcanic Eruption.d: Supports Melee Strike Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on Hit against Ignited Enemies.
Volcanic Eruption.t: Attack, AoE, Melee, Strike, Projectile, Trigger, Fire

Volcanic Fissure.d: Slam the ground, creating a branching Molten Fissure that deals damage as it travels and remains for a duration. Using a different Slam on a Molten Fissure creates a spreading Aftershock.
Volcanic Fissure.t: AoE, Melee, Slam, Sustained, Fire, Duration

Volcano.d: Uplift a volcano from the earth, damaging enemies standing on it and releasing a spray of molten Projectiles. While the volcano persists, Slamming it will cause another Projectile spray. Channelling this Skill for longer makes the initial eruption more violent, but does not affect subsequent Projectile sprays.
Volcano.t: AoE, Projectile, Sustained, Fire, Duration, Channelling

Volt.d: Supports Projectile Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain Voltaic Charge as you move, up to a maximum. When used, Supported Skills expend that Charge to gain extra Lightning Damage.

Voltaic Barrier.d: Raise a pair of electrified pylons in front of you which project a wall of electricity between them, damaging and Electrocuting enemies caught between them. Projectiles you fire through the wall become energised, and discharge that energy on Hit as Chaining Lightning beams.

Voltaic Grenade.d: Fire a bouncing Grenade that discharges an Electrocuting Lightning blast when its fuse expires, causing all Lightning Hits against enemies to contribute to Electrocution buildup for a duration.

Voltaic Mark.d: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Electrocuted. When the Marked target is Electrocuted, the Mark Activates, granting a Buff which gives extra Lightning damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.

Vorana's Siege.d: Supports skills which Hit targets and have an area of effect, increasing the affected area and causing it to Hit Isolated targets harder.

Vruun's Aftermath.d: Supports Warcries, causing them to destroy Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments. Supported Skills empower additional Attacks if they destroy enough Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments.

Vruun's Inevitability.d: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills expend their Combo when used, gaining more area of effect the higher Combo they had. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

Vulnerability.d: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay. making Hits against them ignore a portion of their Armour.

Walking Calamity.d: Build Glory by gaining Rage while already at maximum Rage. When you have maximum Glory, roar to the heavens to bring them down upon your enemies. For the duration of the Skill, meteors rain down around you and you Gain Fire damage and Rage regeneration. This Skill's effects are suppressed if you leave Bear form, but will resume if you return to Bear form before the duration expires.
Walking Calamity.t: Shapeshift, Buff, Bear, AoE, Trigger, Fire, Duration, Conditional

War Banner.d: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Attack damage, Attack speed and Accuracy.
War Banner.t: Buff, Persistent, AoE, Aura, Duration, Conditional

Wardbound Minions.d: Spend all your Runic Ward to summon Temporary Wardbound Casters. These Minions target nearby enemies with damaging Cold Spells.

Warm Blooded.d: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Freeze applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

Wave of Frost.d: Flip backwards and send forth a Freezing wave in front of you, immediately Freezing enemies which are Primed for Freeze.

Whirling Assault.d: Advance while hitting enemies around you with a series of spinning Strikes.

Whirling Slash.d: Perform a circular slash that kicks up a Whirlwind around you, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Leaving the area collapses the storm, dealing damage and causing Knockback.

Whirlwind Lance.d: Throw a Spear with enough force to kick up a Whirlwind where it lands, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Entering the Whirlwind collapses it, dealing damage and causing Knockback. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to create the Whirlwind with one more than its normal maximum number of stages.

Wild Protector.d: Call upon a Bear Spirit Companion to maul your foes. The Bear Spirit leaps at enemies to Maim them, Leeches Life with its slam, and periodically roars to Intimidate enemies. The Bear Spirit does not count toward your Companion limit.

Wildfire.d: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, Spreading Ignites it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.

Wildshards I.d: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

Wildshards II.d: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

Wildwood's Gifts.d: You are chosen by Azmerian spirits who provide guidance, allowing you to see nearby Ancient Blooms.

Wind Blast.d: Batter enemies at range by generating a gust of wind as you swing. Enemies will be Dazed and Knocked Back based on how close they are to you.

Wind Dancer.d: While active, periodically grants stages of a buff that gives you more Evasion per stage. Being Hit by an Enemy while you have this buff consumes all stages to damage and Knock Back enemies around you.
Wind Dancer.t: Attack, Persistent, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Staged

Wind Serpent's Fury.d: Consume all Frenzy Charges to perform a gigantic spear thrust that Knocks Back enemies. For each Frenzy Charge consumed, a Wind Serpent follows in the spear's wake. Each Serpent also damages and Knocks Back enemies.

Wind Wave.d: Supports any skill that you can use, triggering a blast of wind that Knocks Back enemies if you are Stunned while using it.

Window of Opportunity I.d: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

Window of Opportunity II.d: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage and grant Perfect Deflection if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

Wing Blast.d: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and launch yourself backwards with a powerful wingbeat that Knocks Back enemies. Enemies Primed for Heavy Stun will be stunned, release a shockwave, and have a chance to grant you a Power Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.

Wither.d: Channel a debilitating hex that Withers enemies in the area.

Withering Presence.d: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.

Withering Touch.d: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit.

Wolf Pack.d: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions. The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.

Xibaqua's Rending.d: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

Xoph's Pyre.d: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.

Zarokh's Refrain.d: Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells Echo thrice, but are given a Cooldown. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown.

Zarokh's Revolt.d: Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time and giving them a moderate Cooldown. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown or gain seals.

Zenith I.d: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

Zenith II.d: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost Efficiency and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

Zerphi's Infamy.d: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly  increased area of effect.
